description: Governed smoke test for the Keyhole public runtime
prerequisites: KEYHOLE_MCP_TOKEN configured with valid machine identity credentials

steps.name: realize_governed
steps.expected_behavior: The request is gate-checked through the MCP governance surface. If governance approves, status is ACCEPT. If governance rejects, an HTTP 422 is returned with verdict and reason.
steps.note: Actual result depends on live MCP governance evaluation.

evidence_posture: Governed mode: upstream evidence may exist when properly configured. Governed mode does NOT automatically imply canonical promotion. Candidate/verification isolation still applies.

mcp_configuration.note: Obtain credentials from the Keyhole tenant portal.
